name: 3D Animated/Synthetic Visualization
description: Computer-generated 3D renders with synthetic underwater environments. Clean geometry, perfectly controlled lighting, technical equipment rendered with precision.

visual_attributes.lighting: Artificial, synthetic illumination - not natural underwater
visual_attributes.texture: Smooth, polished surfaces, clean geometry, no water particles

image_gen_workflow.prompt_template: [subject] 3D animated render, underwater visualization, synthetic 3D model, clean geometry, artificial lighting, professional 3D animation style, technical illustration, cinematic 3D rendering

video_gen_workflow.motion_prompt_template: smooth 3D camera movement around [subject], 360-degree rotation, cinematic technical visualization, synthetic underwater lighting, clean geometry animation

remotion_role: Text labels, measurements, annotations - never background imagery
